_note: Batch undated_1: documented PARENTS (and full siblings) for married-in spouses that had none shown. Mostly well-documented medieval/early-modern European royalty & nobility plus a few biblical/Jubilees figures. Existing tree ids (ALFREDGREAT, EALHSWITH, CHARLESBALD, JUDITHBAV, RENEANJOU, ISABLORR) are referenced by id and only gain children — no re-parenting. New nodes use the SPG_ prefix. Unknown mothers are '—' placeholders. Disputed/traditional links are flagged in the label. Sources named per family. Ordered so any newly-created parent is defined before it is used as a parent. Web-verified July 2026 against Wikipedia. 14 batch entries had NO documented parents and were skipped (see report).
